DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE ADOPTED. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO DISMISS RESPONDENT'S DEMAND FOR ARBITRATION FOR FAILURE TO OBEY THIS COURT'S PRIOR DISCOVERY ORDER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE COURT FINDS THAT ADDITIONAL ORDERS TO PARTICIPATE IN DISCOVERY WOULD NOT RESULT IN COMPLIANCE. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
